mode_module.title: MCP Build Mode
mode_module.purpose: Guide MCP server, client, tool, resource and prompt implementation for ResearchOps.

required_actions.action: Identify MCP features in scope: resources, prompts, tools, sampling, roots, elicitation, authorization or utilities.
Declare host, client and server responsibilities.
Declare negotiated capabilities and unsupported feature paths.
Define schemas for tool inputs, tool outputs, resource payloads and prompt arguments.
Define consent checkpoints for data exposure, tool invocation and local server execution.
Record logging, progress, cancellation, timeout and error behaviour.

stop_conditions.condition: Requested MCP behaviour is not grounded in official MCP documentation.
Required tool permissions, data boundaries, local execution command or authorization context is unknown.
